headline: Honeywell Spins Off Aerospace To Sharpen Automation Focus And M&A Discipline
summary: Honeywell International (NasdaqGS:HON) plans to spin off its aerospace business, creating a separate aviation focused company. The remaining Honeywell is set to concentrate on industrial automation and related technologies. The company has outlined new three year financial targets alongside a more targeted acquisition approach. Honeywell operates at the intersection of aerospace systems and industrial automation, supplying hardware, software, and services to manufacturers, building...
